title: [ARCH] Evaluate async subagent execution model
description: Research and design how to run async subagents — parallel tool execution, background tasks, agent composition. Review what Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and others do. Balance SOTA features with proven effectiveness. Key: modular design so these compose well with agent loop, harness, system prompt. Depends on clean provider/agent architecture.

logs.msg: Basic sync subagent execution already exists (spawn_subagent tool, SubagentRegistry, run_subagent). This task is about evaluating async/parallel execution: running multiple subagents concurrently, background subagents, result aggregation. The foundation exists but parallel execution is not yet supported.
